patterns.notes: Legacy homepages. khf.tj is the Tajik site, kchs.tj the Russian one — same organisation.

THE dominant pattern. khf.tj: 5,658 promoted + 151 unpromoted article ids in range 94–6112. kchs.tj: 3,796 promoted + 92 unpromoted in range 120–4164. Canonical is /node/{id} — the legacy sites have NO path aliases for articles, so node id is the only key. The new slug is unknown until content migration: store the Drupal node id on the migrated post and generate the CSV from it.
115 static pages total (70 on khf.tj, 45 on kchs.tj), hand-classified in "redirects". Bulk of them are per-person leadership bios and per-department structure pages.
6 nodes (2 khf, 4 kchs). Drupal “running ticker” content type — internal fragments, never a standalone page. Deliberately NOT redirected.
Drupal pager is 0-based, Laravel paginator 1-based — off-by-one must be handled. khf.tj has 1,132 pages (5 items/page), kchs.tj 950 pages (4 items/page).

33 terms total (16 khf, 17 kchs). Most are news categories; a few map onto dedicated new routes: “Закон/Қонун” (58) → /documents, “Чрезвычайные ситуации” (71, kchs) → /incidents, “Правила безопасности” (77, kchs) → /guides, “Эълон/Объявление” (72 khf / 73 kchs) → /vacancies. PostController@index really does accept ?category_id=, but the NEW category ids are only known after migration.

Monthly news archive. 42 real months discovered per site. The new portal has NO month-archive route, so these collapse onto the news index (content loss on deep links — consider adding a date filter).
Drupal calendar view, khf.tj only (142 day-URLs discovered). Infinite low-value URL space — recommend a single wildcard rule to /tj/news, or robots-block + 410 rather than enumerating.

134 distinct legacy file URLs found (104 khf, 30 kchs). A 1:1 map is impossible until the media library assigns ids, so these are pointed at the documents registry. Some legacy file URLs contain a double slash (//) and percent-encoded Cyrillic — normalize on import.
The only human-readable aliases on either site. Everything else is /node/{id}.

DANGER: kchs.tj has a handful of /ru/-prefixed legacy links that 404 today. That prefix collides with the NEW portal /ru locale namespace, so they must be caught explicitly or they will silently 404 after launch.
